race.description: Gloucester Cup 9 July Country Boosted Hcp (Bm58)
race.comment: Genuine mare ROYAL TEENS (4) returned a good figure when beaten a neck over 1312m here in heavy going two runs back. Didn't quite finish off as hoped here last time in a similar contest. Draws a nice gate and certainly deserves another chance. SMART JAZZ (1) is back from a 75-day break. Raced just once last prep and all was not right. Proven at this level and is well in after the claim so this looks a nice race to launch the new campaign. HIT SONG (6) raced handy then battled on evenly for fourth over 1200m at Moree last start. Unproven on a heavy track which is the knock - worth some thought if there is an upgrade. SUNSTAZ (7) has found form at her last couple of runs and is a chance again on a nine-day back-up. BARCELONA EXPRESS (2) has been about the mark of late. His top three strike rate of 67% at this trip over many seasons is hard to ignore.
